steps.title: Compare naming strategies
steps.content: The first sentence describes one possible band-naming strategy: choosing a highly unique and original name. The next sentence presents a different strategy: naming the band after a recognizable song by a favorite band. The transition must introduce a different option.

steps.title: Choose the alternative signal
steps.content:
• Choice B: "Thus" signals a result, but the second strategy is not caused by the first.
  • Choice C: "In other words" signals restatement, but the second strategy is different.
  • Choice D: "For instance" signals an example, but the song-title strategy is not an example of choosing the most original possible name.
The answer is A.
